pageContext.name: Sally Cat on Gravestone
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Enesco present the Sally Cat on Gravestone Figurine!  In her patchwork dress, Sally the rag doll sits atop a tombstone with a cat in this inviting piece by Jim Shore. The beloved Nightmare Before Christmas heroine is a vision of independence and compassion.   Disney fans, don't miss your chance to take home the magic of Disney collectibles this season!
